message:
feat(fp-frame): add str.replace n/case/regex option parity (frankenpandas-ghqp)

Adds StrAccessor::replace_with_options covering the full pandas 2.2
Series.str.replace(pat, repl, n, case, regex) surface. The regex path
uses Regex::replacen for capped replacements and (?i) inline flag for
case=false. The literal path delegates to a new helper,
literal_replace_n_case, which routes case-insensitive literal replace
through regex::escape + (?i) to avoid byte-length ambiguity from
case-folding (e.g. ß → ss).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
